case_title: JENNA GREENFIELD VS. 600 OAK ST, LLC et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY GREENFIELD, JENNA AS TO DEFENDANT 600 OAK ST, LLC C/O GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC. ZIP CAR INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-27-2013 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: FILE IS DESTROYED PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153. ORDER SIGNED AND FILED ON 10/14/2025.
AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,100.00 FILED BY GREENFIELD, JENNA AS TO DEFENDANT ZIP CAR INC. SF 600 OAK STREET, LLC. GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENFIELD, JENNA AS TO DEFENDANT ZIP CAR INC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENFIELD, JENNA AS TO DEFENDANT 600 OAK ST, LLC C/O GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.
RETURN MAIL RE: SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION L.R. 18.0 ENVELOPE MARKED: RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD AS TO DEFENDANT SF 600 OAK STREET, LLC.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENFIELD, JENNA AS TO DEFENDANT GREENTREE PROPERTY MANAGEMENT, INC.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZIP CAR, INC WAS PRESENT, EXCEPT DEFENDANTS GREENTREE ETC AND SF 600 OAK ST. WHO WERE NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT ZIP CAR, INC. WAS REPRESENTED BY JONATHAN TYBYURSKI--LOCATION MANAGER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID YANG. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-27-2013 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JAN-17-2014 AT 8:30AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM JEAN MILEFF. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF GREENFIELD, JENNA AS TO DEFENDANT SF 600 OAK STREET, LLC.
